title: Isomorphic Strings
hints: Focus on the mapping rules: each character in s must map to exactly one character in t, and no two characters in s can map to the same character in t.
Use two hash maps (or arrays) to track the mappings from s to t and from t to s simultaneously as you iterate through the strings.
For each character pair, check if the mapping exists and is consistent in both directions; if a conflict is found, return false immediately.
